name: AI Email & Calendar Management Assistant
description: Fetches recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to classify, prioritize, and suggest replies and meeting times, then saves the organized inbox report to Google Sheets and posts a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's Gmail + Google Calendar AI management workflow.

source.originalName: Automate email & calendar management with Gmail, Google Calendar & GPT-4o AI

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving the report

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the summary

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save inbox analysis

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the inbox summary

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to filter emails (default: last 24 hours)

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for email classification and calendar management
Run Claude AI email and calendar analysis
Build Google Sheets rows from analysis
Save email analysis to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit inbox summary
